name: Servicenow Group Memberships With Missing Users
description: Detects orphaned servicenow group memberships referencing users that no longer exist.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM servicenow_group_memberships m LEFT JOIN servicenow_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.user_id IS NOT NULL AND u.id IS NULL
remediation: Remove orphaned memberships and reconcile group assignments from authoritative identity sources.
